positive: A stylized minimalist celestial creature, depicted as a majestic winged fox or lunar cat, floating in a nebula of deep indigo and sapphire blue. The creature should have luminous, glowing outlines (neon ethereal style) against a dark cosmic background, creating high contrast. Incorporate geometric constellations and abstract swirling galaxy dust as accents. The overall composition must be centered, suitable for a T-shirt graphic, clean lines, and strong silhouettes. Style: Art Nouveau mixed with modern abstract geometry. Lighting: Dramatic volumetric glow originating from the creature and nebula core. Color palette: Deep blues, purples, black, accented by luminous cyan and gold."
